description: Live run-tool E2E tool list for the Terrain3D Tools extension (CLASS-B: wraps the Terrain3D GDExtension addon, installed into testbed/addons/terrain_3d/ by the e2e-godot job before --import). Driven by tests/e2e/run_tool_e2e.py from the e2e-godot CI leg against a connected headless editor + a local gamedev-mcp-server. Each entry is one real assertion; a regression turns the CI leg red.
notes: The five editor tools resolve nodes relative to the edited scene root, so the 'setup' phase opens a scene first via the core godot_mcp 'scene-create' tool. terrain3d-defaults is pure-managed (no scene, no addon) and runs first. 'expect' substrings are matched against godot-cli's compact --raw JSON, which uses ReflectorNet PascalCase property names — so the presence-gate field asserts as "Installed":true (NOT "installed":true). The happy-path editor entries assert "Installed":true plus extension-PRODUCED scalar fields (RegionSize/DataDirectory/HasMaterial) rather than TypeName (node.GetClass() casing is the engine's, not the C# binding's). terrain3d-set-region-size passes 500, which snaps to the nearest valid Terrain3D RegionSize (512).
